tEn: Unsupervised Learning of Visual Features by Contrasting Cluster Assignments
tZh: 通过对比聚类分配进行视觉特征的无监督学习
sEn: SwAV achieves unsupervised learning by contrasting cluster assignments instead of pairwise features, enabling efficient scaling and strong performance.
sZh: SwAV通过对比聚类分配而非成对特征实现无监督学习，高效可扩展且性能强劲。
absEn: Unsupervised image representations have significantly reduced the gap with supervised pretraining, notably with the recent achievements of contrastive learning methods. These contrastive methods typically work online and rely on a large number of explicit pairwise feature comparisons, which is computationally challenging. In this paper, we propose an online algorithm, SwAV, that takes advantage of contrastive methods without requiring to compute pairwise comparisons. Specifically, our method simultaneously clusters the data while enforcing consistency between cluster assignments produced for different augmentations (or views) of the same image, instead of comparing features directly as in contrastive learning. Simply put, we use a swapped prediction mechanism where we predict the cluster assignment of a view from the representation of another view. Our method can be trained with large and small batches and can scale to unlimited amounts of data. Compared to previous contrastive methods, our method is more memory efficient since it does not require a large memory bank or a special momentum network. In addition, we also propose a new data augmentation strategy, multi-crop, that uses a mix of views with different resolutions in place of two full-resolution views, without increasing the memory or compute requirements much. We validate our findings by achieving 75.3% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet with ResNet-50, as well as surpassing supervised pretraining on all the considered transfer tasks.
absZh: 无监督图像表示已显著缩小了与有监督预训练的差距，尤其是近期对比学习方法的成就。这些对比方法通常在线工作，依赖大量显式的成对特征比较，计算上具有挑战性。本文提出在线算法SwAV，利用对比方法的优势而无需计算成对比较。具体而言，我们的方法在聚类数据的同时，强制同一图像不同增强（或视图）产生的聚类分配之间的一致性，而非像对比学习那样直接比较特征。简单来说，我们使用交换预测机制，从一个视图的表示预测另一个视图的聚类分配。我们的方法可在大批量和小批量下训练，并能扩展到无限数据。与之前的对比方法相比，我们的方法更节省内存，因为它不需要大型内存库或特殊动量网络。此外，我们还提出新的数据增强策略multi-crop，使用不同分辨率的视图混合替代两个全分辨率视图，而不显著增加内存或计算需求。我们通过ResNet-50在ImageNet上达到75.3%的top-1准确率，并在所有考虑的迁移任务上超越有监督预训练，验证了我们的发现。

limits.zh: 方法假设每批原型均匀分配，对极小批量可能失效。

items.en: Unsupervised image representations have significantly reduced the gap with supervised pretraining, notably with the recent achievements of contrastive learning methods. These contrastive methods typically work online and rely on a large number of explicit pairwise feature comparisons, which is computationally challenging. In this paper, we propose an online algorithm, SwAV, that takes advantage of contrastive methods without requiring to compute pairwise comparisons. Specifically, our method simultaneously clusters the data while enforcing consistency between cluster assignments produced for different augmentations (or “views”) of the same image, instead of comparing features directly as in contrastive learning. Simply put, we use a “swapped” prediction mechanism where we predict the code of a view from the representation of another view. Our method can be trained with large and small batches and can scale to unlimited amounts of data. Compared to previous contrastive methods, our method is more memory efficient since it does not require a large memory bank or a special momentum network. In addition, we also propose a new data augmentation strategy, multi-crop, that uses a mix of views with different resolutions in place of two full-resolution views, without increasing the memory or compute requirements. We validate our findings by achieving 75.3%percent75.375.3\% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet with ResNet-50, as well as surpassing supervised pretraining on all the considered transfer tasks.
items.zh: 无监督图像表示已显著缩小了与有监督预训练的差距，尤其是最近对比学习方法的成就。这些对比方法通常在线工作，并依赖于大量显式的成对特征比较，这在计算上具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种在线算法 SwAV，它利用对比方法的优势，无需计算成对比较。具体来说，我们的方法同时聚类数据，同时强制同一图像的不同增强（或“视图”）产生的聚类分配之间的一致性，而不是像对比学习那样直接比较特征。简而言之，我们使用一种“交换”预测机制，即从一个视图的表示预测另一个视图的编码。我们的方法可以使用大批量和小批量进行训练，并且可以扩展到无限量的数据。与之前的对比方法相比，我们的方法更节省内存，因为它不需要大型内存库或特殊的动量网络。此外，我们还提出了一种新的数据增强策略 multi-crop，它使用不同分辨率的视图混合代替两个全分辨率视图，而不增加内存或计算需求。我们通过在 ImageNet 上使用 ResNet-50 达到 75.3% 的 top-1 准确率，以及在所有考虑的迁移任务上超越有监督预训练，验证了我们的发现。

items.en: Unsupervised visual representation learning, or self-supervised learning, aims at obtaining features without using manual annotations and is rapidly closing the performance gap with supervised pretraining in computer vision [10, 24, 44]. Many recent state-of-the-art methods build upon the instance discrimination task that considers each image of the dataset (or “instance”) and its transformations as a separate class [16]. This task yields representations that are able to discriminate between different images, while achieving some invariance to image transformations. Recent self-supervised methods that use instance discrimination rely on a combination of two elements: (i) a contrastive loss [23] and (ii) a set of image transformations. The contrastive loss removes the notion of instance classes by directly comparing image features while the image transformations define the invariances encoded in the features. Both elements are essential to the quality of the resulting networks [44, 10] and our work improves upon both the objective function and the transformations.
items.zh: 无监督视觉表示学习，或自监督学习，旨在无需人工标注的情况下获得特征，并且正在迅速缩小与计算机视觉中有监督预训练的性能差距 [10, 24, 44]。许多最近的最先进方法建立在实例判别任务之上，该任务将数据集中的每个图像（或“实例”）及其变换视为一个单独的类 [16]。该任务产生的表示能够区分不同图像，同时实现一定程度的图像变换不变性。最近使用实例判别的自监督方法依赖于两个要素的组合：(i) 对比损失 [23] 和 (ii) 一组图像变换。对比损失通过直接比较图像特征消除了实例类的概念，而图像变换定义了编码在特征中的不变性。这两个要素对于所得网络的质量都至关重要 [44, 10]，我们的工作改进了目标函数和变换。

items.en: The contrastive loss explicitly compares pairs of image representations to push away representations from different images while pulling together those from transformations, or views, of the same image. Since computing all the pairwise comparisons on a large dataset is not practical, most implementations approximate the loss by reducing the number of comparisons to random subsets of images during training [10, 24, 58]. An alternative to approximate the loss is to approximate the task—that is to relax the instance discrimination problem. For example, clustering-based methods discriminate between groups of images with similar features instead of individual images [7]. The objective in clustering is tractable, but it does not scale well with the dataset as it requires a pass over the entire dataset to form image “codes” (i.e., cluster assignments) that are used as targets during training. In this work, we use a different paradigm and propose to compute the codes online while enforcing consistency between codes obtained from views of the same image. Comparing cluster assignments allows to contrast different image views while not relying on explicit pairwise feature comparisons. Specifically, we propose a simple “swapped” prediction problem where we predict the code of a view from the representation of another view. We learn features by Swapping Assignments between multiple Views of the same image (SwAV). The features and the codes are learned online, allowing our method to scale to potentially unlimited amounts of data. In addition, SwAV works with small and large batch sizes and does not need a large memory bank [58] or a momentum encoder [24].
items.zh: 对比损失显式比较图像表示对，以推开不同图像的表示，同时拉近同一图像变换或视图的表示。由于在大数据集上计算所有成对比较不切实际，大多数实现通过将比较次数减少到训练期间的随机图像子集来近似损失 [10, 24, 58]。近似损失的另一种方法是近似任务——即放宽实例判别问题。例如，基于聚类的方法区分具有相似特征的图像组，而不是单个图像 [7]。聚类的目标是可处理的，但它不能随数据集很好地扩展，因为它需要遍历整个数据集来形成用作训练目标的图像“编码”（即聚类分配）。在这项工作中，我们使用不同的范式，并提出在线计算编码，同时强制同一图像视图获得的编码之间的一致性。比较聚类分配允许对比不同的图像视图，同时不依赖显式的成对特征比较。具体来说，我们提出了一个简单的“交换”预测问题，即从一个视图的表示预测另一个视图的编码。我们通过同一图像的多个视图之间的交换分配（SwAV）来学习特征。特征和编码是在线学习的，使我们的方法能够扩展到可能无限量的数据。此外，SwAV 适用于小批量和大批量，并且不需要大型内存库 [58] 或动量编码器 [24]。

items.en: Besides our online clustering-based method, we also propose an improvement to the image transformations. Most contrastive methods compare one pair of transformations per image, even though there is evidence that comparing more views during training improves the resulting model [44]. In this work, we propose multi-crop that uses smaller-sized images to increase the number of views while not increasing the memory or computational requirements during training. We also observe that mapping small parts of a scene to more global views significantly boosts the performance. Directly working with downsized images introduces a bias in the features [53], which can be avoided by using a mix of different sizes. Our strategy is simple, yet effective, and can be applied to many self-supervised methods with consistent gain in performance.
items.zh: 除了我们基于在线聚类的方法，我们还提出了对图像变换的改进。大多数对比方法比较每个图像的一对变换，尽管有证据表明在训练期间比较更多视图会改善所得模型 [44]。在这项工作中，我们提出了 multi-crop，它使用较小尺寸的图像来增加视图数量，同时不增加训练期间的内存或计算需求。我们还观察到，将场景的小部分映射到更全局的视图显著提升了性能。直接使用缩小图像会在特征中引入偏差 [53]，这可以通过使用不同尺寸的混合来避免。我们的策略简单而有效，并且可以应用于许多自监督方法，带来一致的性能提升。

items.en: We validate our contributions by evaluating our method on several standard self-supervised benchmarks. In particular, on the ImageNet linear evaluation protocol, we reach 75.3%percent75.375.3\% top-111 accuracy with a standard ResNet-50, and 78.5%percent78.578.5\% with a wider model. We also show that our multi-crop strategy is general, and improves the performance of different self-supervised methods, namely SimCLR [10], DeepCluster [7], and SeLa [2], between 2%percent22\% and 4%percent44\% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet. Overall, we make the following contributions:
items.zh: 我们通过评估我们的方法在几个标准自监督基准上的表现来验证我们的贡献。特别是在 ImageNet 线性评估协议上，我们使用标准 ResNet-50 达到了 75.3% 的 top-1 准确率，使用更宽的模型达到了 78.5%。我们还展示了我们的 multi-crop 策略是通用的，并且将不同自监督方法（即 SimCLR [10]、DeepCluster [7] 和 SeLa [2]）在 ImageNet 上的 top-1 准确率提高了 2% 到 4%。总的来说，我们做出了以下贡献：

items.en: We propose a scalable online clustering loss that improves performance by +2%percent2+2\% on ImageNet and works in both large and small batch settings without a large memory bank or a momentum encoder.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种可扩展的在线聚类损失，在 ImageNet 上提高了 +2% 的性能，并且适用于大批量和小批量设置，无需大型内存库或动量编码器。

items.en: We introduce the multi-crop strategy to increase the number of views of an image with no computational or memory overhead. We observe a consistent improvement of between 2%percent22\% and 4%percent44\% on ImageNet with this strategy on several self-supervised methods.
items.zh: 我们引入了 multi-crop 策略，以增加图像的视图数量，且没有计算或内存开销。我们观察到，在几种自监督方法上使用此策略，ImageNet 上的性能一致提高了 2% 到 4%。

items.en: Combining both technical contributions into a single model, we improve the performance of self-supervised by +4.2%percent4.2+4.2\% on ImageNet with a standard ResNet and outperforms supervised ImageNet pretraining on multiple downstream tasks. This is the first method to do so without finetuning the features, i.e., only with a linear classifier on top of frozen features.
items.zh: 将这两项技术贡献结合到一个模型中，我们使用标准 ResNet 将自监督的性能在 ImageNet 上提高了 +4.2%，并在多个下游任务上超越了有监督的 ImageNet 预训练。这是第一个在不微调特征的情况下（即仅在冻结特征之上使用线性分类器）做到这一点的方法。

items.en: Instance-level classification considers each image in a dataset as its own class [5, 16, 58]. Dosovitskiy et al. [16] assign a class explicitly to each image and learn a linear classifier with as many classes as images in the dataset. As this approach becomes quickly intractable, Wu et al. [58] mitigate this issue by replacing the classifier with a memory bank that stores previously-computed representations. They rely on noise contrastive estimation [22] to compare instances, which is a special form of contrastive learning [29, 47]. He et al. [24] improve the training of contrastive methods by storing representations from a momentum encoder instead of the trained network. More recently, Chen et al. [10] show that the memory bank can be entirely replaced with the elements from the same batch if the batch is large enough. In contrast to this line of works, we avoid comparing every pair of images by mapping the image features to a set of trainable prototype vectors.
items.zh: 实例级分类将数据集中的每个图像视为其自己的类 [5, 16, 58]。Dosovitskiy 等人 [16] 为每个图像显式分配一个类，并学习一个与数据集中图像数量一样多的类的线性分类器。由于这种方法很快变得不可处理，Wu 等人 [58] 通过用存储先前计算表示的内存库替换分类器来缓解这个问题。他们依赖噪声对比估计 [22] 来比较实例，这是对比学习的一种特殊形式 [29, 47]。He 等人 [24] 通过存储来自动量编码器而不是训练网络的表示，改进了对比方法的训练。最近，Chen 等人 [10] 表明，如果批量足够大，内存库可以完全被同一批次的元素取代。与这一系列工作相反，我们通过将图像特征映射到一组可训练的原型向量来避免比较每一对图像。

items.en: Our work is also related to clustering-based methods [2, 4, 7, 8, 30, 59, 63, 68, 19, 62]. Caron et al. [7] show that k𝑘k-means assignments can be used as pseudo-labels to learn visual representations. This method scales to large uncurated dataset and can be used for pre-training of supervised networks [8]. However, their formulation is not principled and recently, Asano et al. [2] show how to cast the pseudo-label assignment problem as an instance of the optimal transport problem. We consider a similar formulation to map representations to prototype vectors, but unlike [2] we keep the soft assignment produced by the Sinkhorn-Knopp algorithm [13] instead of approximating it into a hard assignment. Besides, unlike Caron et al. [7, 8] and Asano et al. [2], we obtain online assignments which allows our method to scale gracefully to any dataset size.
items.zh: 我们的工作也与基于聚类的方法相关 [2, 4, 7, 8, 30, 59, 63, 68, 19, 62]。Caron 等人 [7] 表明，k 均值分配可以用作伪标签来学习视觉表示。这种方法可以扩展到大型未整理数据集，并可用于有监督网络的预训练 [8]。然而，他们的公式缺乏原则性，最近 Asano 等人 [2] 展示了如何将伪标签分配问题转化为最优传输问题的一个实例。我们考虑类似的公式将表示映射到原型向量，但与 [2] 不同，我们保留由 Sinkhorn-Knopp 算法 [13] 产生的软分配，而不是将其近似为硬分配。此外，与 Caron 等人 [7, 8] 和 Asano 等人 [2] 不同，我们获得在线分配，这使得我们的方法能够优雅地扩展到任何数据集大小。

items.en: Many self-supervised methods manipulate the input data to extract a supervised signal in the form of a pretext task [14, 1, 31, 34, 36, 42, 45, 48, 49, 55, 56, 66]. We refer the reader to Jing et al. [32] for an exhaustive and detailed review of this literature. Of particular interest, Misra and van der Maaten [44] propose to encode the jigsaw puzzle task [46] as an invariant for contrastive learning. Jigsaw tiles are non-overlapping crops with small resolution that cover only part (∼20%similar-toabsentpercent20{\sim}20\%) of the entire image area. In contrast, our multi-crop strategy consists in simply sampling multiple random crops with two different sizes: a standard size and a smaller one.
items.zh: 许多自监督方法操作输入数据，以预文本任务的形式提取监督信号 [14, 1, 31, 34, 36, 42, 45, 48, 49, 55, 56, 66]。我们请读者参考 Jing 等人 [32] 以获取详尽和详细的文献综述。特别值得注意的是，Misra 和 van der Maaten [44] 提出将拼图任务 [46] 编码为对比学习的不变性。拼图块是非重叠的、分辨率较小的裁剪，仅覆盖整个图像区域的一部分（约 20%）。相比之下，我们的 multi-crop 策略包括简单地采样多个随机裁剪，具有两种不同尺寸：标准尺寸和较小尺寸。

items.en: Our goal is to learn visual features in an online fashion without supervision. To that effect, we propose an online clustering-based self-supervised method. Typical clustering-based methods [2, 7] are offline in the sense that they alternate between a cluster assignment step where image features of the entire dataset are clustered, and a training step where the cluster assignments, i.e., “codes” are predicted for different image views. Unfortunately, these methods are not suitable for online learning as they require multiple passes over the dataset to compute the image features necessary for clustering. In this section, we describe an alternative where we enforce consistency between codes from different augmentations of the same image. This solution is inspired by contrastive instance learning [58] as we do not consider the codes as a target, but only enforce consistent mapping between views of the same image. Our method can be interpreted as a way of contrasting between multiple image views by comparing their cluster assignments instead of their features.
items.zh: 我们的目标是在没有监督的情况下在线学习视觉特征。为此，我们提出了一种基于在线聚类的自监督方法。典型的基于聚类的方法 [2, 7] 是离线的，因为它们交替进行聚类分配步骤（对整个数据集的图像特征进行聚类）和训练步骤（预测不同图像视图的聚类分配，即“编码”）。不幸的是，这些方法不适合在线学习，因为它们需要多次遍历数据集来计算聚类所需的图像特征。在本节中，我们描述了一种替代方案，其中我们强制同一图像的不同增强之间的编码一致性。该解决方案受对比实例学习 [58] 的启发，因为我们不将编码视为目标，而只强制同一图像视图之间的一致映射。我们的方法可以解释为通过比较聚类分配而不是特征来对比多个图像视图的一种方式。

Given two image features 𝐳tsubscript𝐳𝑡\mathbf{z}_{t} and 𝐳ssubscript𝐳𝑠\mathbf{z}_{s} from two different augmentations of the same image, we compute their codes 𝐪tsubscript𝐪𝑡\mathbf{q}_{t} and 𝐪ssubscript𝐪𝑠\mathbf{q}_{s} by matching these features to a set of K𝐾K prototypes {𝐜1,…,𝐜K}subscript𝐜1…subscript𝐜𝐾\{\mathbf{c}_{1},\dots,\mathbf{c}_{K}\}. items.zh: 更准确地说，我们从图像的增强版本计算一个编码，并从同一图像的其他增强版本预测该编码。给定来自同一图像的两个不同增强的两个图像特征 z_t 和 z_s，我们通过将这些特征匹配到一组 K 个原型 {c_1, ..., c_K} 来计算它们的编码 q_t 和 q_s。然后我们设置一个“交换”预测问题，其损失函数如下：

items.en: where the function ℓ​(𝐳,𝐪)ℓ𝐳𝐪\ell({\mathbf{z}},{\mathbf{q}}) measures the fit between features 𝐳𝐳{\mathbf{z}} and a code 𝐪𝐪{\mathbf{q}}, as detailed later. Intuitively, our method compares the features 𝐳tsubscript𝐳𝑡\mathbf{z}_{t} and 𝐳ssubscript𝐳𝑠\mathbf{z}_{s} using the intermediate codes 𝐪tsubscript𝐪𝑡\mathbf{q}_{t} and 𝐪ssubscript𝐪𝑠\mathbf{q}_{s}. If these two features capture the same information, it should be possible to predict the code from the other feature. A similar comparison appears in contrastive learning where features are compared directly [58]. In fig. 1, we illustrate the relation between contrastive learning and our method.
items.zh: 其中函数 ℓ(z, q) 衡量特征 z 和编码 q 之间的拟合度，稍后将详细说明。直观地说，我们的方法使用中间编码 q_t 和 q_s 来比较特征 z_t 和 z_s。如果这两个特征捕获了相同的信息，那么应该可以从另一个特征预测编码。类似的比较出现在对比学习中，其中特征被直接比较 [58]。在图 1 中，我们说明了对比学习与我们方法之间的关系。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Contrastive instance learning (left) vs. SwAV (right). In contrastive learning methods applied to instance classification, the features from different transformations of the same images are compared directly to each other. In SwAV, we first obtain “codes” by assigning features to prototype vectors. We then solve a “swapped” prediction problem wherein the codes obtained from one data augmented view are predicted using the other view. Thus, SwAV does not directly compare image features. Prototype vectors are learned along with the ConvNet parameters by backpropragation.
items.capZh: 图 1：对比实例学习（左）与 SwAV（右）。在应用于实例分类的对比学习方法中，来自同一图像不同变换的特征被直接相互比较。在 SwAV 中，我们首先通过将特征分配给原型向量来获得“编码”。然后我们解决一个“交换”预测问题，其中从一个数据增强视图获得的编码使用另一个视图进行预测。因此，SwAV 不直接比较图像特征。原型向量通过反向传播与 ConvNet 参数一起学习。

items.en: Each image 𝐱nsubscript𝐱𝑛\mathbf{x}_{n} is transformed into an augmented view 𝐱n​tsubscript𝐱𝑛𝑡\mathbf{x}_{nt} by applying a transformation t𝑡t sampled from the set 𝒯𝒯\mathcal{T} of image transformations. The augmented view is mapped to a vector representation by applying a non-linear mapping fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} to 𝐱n​tsubscript𝐱𝑛𝑡\mathbf{x}_{nt}. The feature is then projected to the unit sphere, i.e., 𝐳n​t=fθ​(𝐱n​t)/‖fθ​(𝐱n​t)‖2subscript𝐳𝑛𝑡subscript𝑓𝜃subscript𝐱𝑛𝑡subscriptnormsubscript𝑓𝜃subscript𝐱𝑛𝑡2\mathbf{z}_{nt}=f_{\theta}(\mathbf{x}_{nt})/\|f_{\theta}(\mathbf{x}_{nt})\|_{2}. We then compute a code 𝐪n​tsubscript𝐪𝑛𝑡\mathbf{q}_{nt} from this feature by mapping 𝐳n​tsubscript𝐳𝑛𝑡\mathbf{z}_{nt} to a set of K𝐾K trainable prototypes vectors, {𝐜1,…,𝐜K}subscript𝐜1…subscript𝐜𝐾\{\mathbf{c}_{1},\dots,\mathbf{c}_{K}\}. We denote by 𝐂𝐂\mathbf{C} the matrix whose columns are the 𝐜1,…,𝐜ksubscript𝐜1…subscript𝐜𝑘\mathbf{c}_{1},\dots,\mathbf{c}_{k}. We now describe how to compute these codes and update the prototypes online.
items.zh: 每个图像 x_n 通过应用从图像变换集合 T 中采样的变换 t 被转换为增强视图 x_{nt}。增强视图通过将非线性映射 f_θ 应用于 x_{nt} 被映射到向量表示。然后特征被投影到单位球面上，即 z_{nt} = f_θ(x_{nt}) / ||f_θ(x_{nt})||_2。然后我们通过将 z_{nt} 映射到一组 K 个可训练的原型向量 {c_1, ..., c_K} 来计算编码 q_{nt}。我们用 C 表示列向量为 c_1, ..., c_K 的矩阵。我们现在描述如何在线计算这些编码并更新原型。

items.en: The loss function in Eq. (1) has two terms that setup the “swapped” prediction problem of predicting the code 𝐪tsubscript𝐪𝑡\mathbf{q}_{t} from the feature 𝐳ssubscript𝐳𝑠\mathbf{z}_{s}, and 𝐪ssubscript𝐪𝑠\mathbf{q}_{s} from 𝐳tsubscript𝐳𝑡\mathbf{z}_{t}. Each term represents the cross entropy loss between the code and the probability obtained by taking a softmax of the dot products of 𝐳isubscript𝐳𝑖\mathbf{z}_{i} and all prototypes in 𝐂𝐂\mathbf{C}, i.e.,
items.zh: 公式 (1) 中的损失函数有两项，设置了“交换”预测问题：从特征 z_s 预测编码 q_t，以及从 z_t 预测 q_s。每一项表示编码与通过取 z_i 与 C 中所有原型的点积的 softmax 获得的概率之间的交叉熵损失，即

items.en: where τ𝜏\tau is a temperature parameter [58]. Taking this loss over all the images and pairs of data augmentations leads to the following loss function for the swapped prediction problem:
items.zh: 其中 τ 是温度参数 [58]。对所有图像和数据增强对取此损失，得到交换预测问题的以下损失函数：

items.en: This loss function is jointly minimized with respect to the prototypes 𝐂𝐂\mathbf{C} and the parameters θ𝜃\theta of the image encoder fθsubscript𝑓𝜃f_{\theta} used to produce the features (𝐳n​t)n,tsubscriptsubscript𝐳𝑛𝑡𝑛𝑡(\mathbf{z}_{nt})_{n,t}.
items.zh: 该损失函数相对于原型 C 和用于产生特征 (z_{nt})_{n,t} 的图像编码器 f_θ 的参数 θ 被联合最小化。

items.en: In order to make our method online, we compute the codes using only the image features within a batch. Intuitively, as the prototypes 𝐂𝐂\mathbf{C} are used across different batches, SwAV clusters multiple instances to the prototypes. We compute codes using the prototypes 𝐂𝐂\mathbf{C} such that all the examples in a batch are equally partitioned by the prototypes. This equipartition constraint ensures that the codes for different images in a batch are distinct, thus preventing the trivial solution where every image has the same code. Given B𝐵B feature vectors 𝐙=[𝐳1,…,𝐳B]𝐙subscript𝐳1…subscript𝐳𝐵\mathbf{Z}=[\mathbf{z}_{1},\dots,\mathbf{z}_{B}], we are interested in mapping them to the prototypes 𝐂=[𝐜1,…,𝐜K]𝐂subscript𝐜1…subscript𝐜𝐾\mathbf{C}=[\mathbf{c}_{1},\dots,\mathbf{c}_{K}]. We denote this mapping or codes by 𝐐=[𝐪1,…,𝐪B]𝐐subscript𝐪1…subscript𝐪𝐵\mathbf{Q}=[\mathbf{q}_{1},\dots,\mathbf{q}_{B}], and optimize 𝐐𝐐\mathbf{Q} to maximize the similarity between the features and the prototypes , i.e.,
items.zh: 为了使我们的方法在线，我们仅使用批次内的图像特征来计算编码。直观地说，由于原型 C 在不同批次之间使用，SwAV 将多个实例聚类到原型。我们使用原型 C 计算编码，使得批次中的所有示例被原型等分。这种等分约束确保批次中不同图像的编码是不同的，从而防止每个图像具有相同编码的平凡解。给定 B 个特征向量 Z = [z_1, ..., z_B]，我们感兴趣的是将它们映射到原型 C = [c_1, ..., c_K]。我们将此映射或编码表示为 Q = [q_1, ..., q_B]，并优化 Q 以最大化特征与原型之间的相似性，即

items.en: where H𝐻H is the entropy function, H​(𝐐)=−∑i​j𝐐i​j​log⁡𝐐i​j𝐻𝐐subscript𝑖𝑗subscript𝐐𝑖𝑗subscript𝐐𝑖𝑗H(\mathbf{Q})=-\sum_{ij}\mathbf{Q}_{ij}\log\mathbf{Q}_{ij} and ε𝜀\varepsilon is a parameter that controls the smoothness of the mapping. We observe that a strong entropy regularization (i.e. using a high ε𝜀\varepsilon) generally leads to a trivial solution where all samples collapse into an unique representation and are all assigned uniformely to all prototypes. Hence, in practice we keep ε𝜀\varepsilon low. Asano et al. [2] enforce an equal partition by constraining the matrix 𝐐𝐐\mathbf{Q} to belong to the transportation polytope. They work on the full dataset, and we propose to adapt their solution to work on minibatches by restricting the transportation polytope to the minibatch:
items.zh: 其中 H 是熵函数，H(Q) = -∑_{ij} Q_{ij} log Q_{ij}，ε 是控制映射平滑度的参数。我们观察到，强熵正则化（即使用高 ε）通常会导致平凡解，即所有样本坍缩为唯一表示并均匀分配给所有原型。因此，实践中我们保持 ε 较小。Asano 等人 [2] 通过约束矩阵 Q 属于运输多面体来强制等分。他们处理完整数据集，我们提出通过将运输多面体限制在小批量上，使其适用于小批量：

items.en: where 𝟏Ksubscript1𝐾\mathbf{1}_{K} denotes the vector of ones in dimension K𝐾K. These constraints enforce that on average each prototype is selected at least BK𝐵𝐾\frac{B}{K} times in the batch.
items.zh: 其中 1_K 表示 K 维全1向量。这些约束强制每个原型在批次中平均至少被选择 B/K 次。

items.en: Once a continuous solution 𝐐∗superscript𝐐\mathbf{Q}^{*} to Prob. (3) is found, a discrete code can be obtained by using a rounding procedure [2]. Empirically, we found that discrete codes work well when computing codes in an offline manner on the full dataset as in Asano et al. [2]. However, in the online setting where we use only minibatches, using the discrete codes performs worse than using the continuous codes. An explanation is that the rounding needed to obtain discrete codes is a more aggressive optimization step than gradient updates. While it makes the model converge rapidly, it leads to a worse solution. We thus preserve the soft code 𝐐∗superscript𝐐\mathbf{Q}^{*} instead of rounding it. These soft codes 𝐐∗superscript𝐐\mathbf{Q}^{*} are the solution of Prob. (3) over the set 𝒬𝒬\mathcal{Q} and takes the form of a normalized exponential matrix [13]:
items.zh: 一旦找到问题 (3) 的连续解 Q*，可以通过舍入过程 [2] 获得离散编码。经验上，我们发现像 Asano 等人 [2] 那样在完整数据集上离线计算编码时，离散编码效果良好。然而，在仅使用小批量的在线设置中，使用离散编码的效果不如连续编码。一个解释是，获得离散编码所需的舍入比梯度更新更激进。虽然它使模型快速收敛，但会导致更差的解。因此，我们保留软编码 Q* 而非舍入。这些软编码 Q* 是问题 (3) 在集合 Q 上的解，形式为归一化指数矩阵 [13]：

items.en: where 𝐮𝐮\mathbf{u} and 𝐯𝐯\mathbf{v} are renormalization vectors in ℝKsuperscriptℝ𝐾\mathbb{R}^{K} and ℝBsuperscriptℝ𝐵\mathbb{R}^{B} respectively. The renormalization vectors are computed using a small number of matrix multiplications using the iterative Sinkhorn-Knopp algorithm [13]. In practice, we observe that using only 333 iterations is fast and sufficient to obtain good performance. Indeed, this algorithm can be efficiently implemented on GPU, and the alignment of 444K features to 333K codes takes 353535ms in our experiments, see § 4.
items.zh: 其中 u 和 v 分别是 R^K 和 R^B 中的重归一化向量。重归一化向量通过迭代 Sinkhorn-Knopp 算法 [13] 使用少量矩阵乘法计算。实践中，我们观察到仅使用 3 次迭代就足够快且能获得良好性能。实际上，该算法可以在 GPU 上高效实现，在我们的实验中，将 4K 特征对齐到 3K 编码需要 35ms，见第 4 节。

items.en: When the number B𝐵B of batch features is too small compared to the number of prototypes K𝐾K, it is impossible to equally partition the batch into the K𝐾K prototypes. Therefore, when working with small batches, we use features from the previous batches to augment the size of 𝐙𝐙\mathbf{Z} in Prob. (3). Then, we only use the codes of the batch features in our training loss. In practice, we store around 333K features, i.e., in the same range as the number of code vectors. This means that we only keep features from the last 151515 batches with a batch size of 256256256, while contrastive methods typically need to store the last 656565K instances obtained from the last 250250250 batches [24].
items.zh: 当批次特征数 B 与原型数 K 相比太小时，不可能将批次均分到 K 个原型。因此，当使用小批次时，我们使用之前批次的特征来增大问题 (3) 中 Z 的大小。然后，我们仅在训练损失中使用批次特征的编码。实践中，我们存储约 3K 个特征，即与编码向量数量相近。这意味着我们仅保留最近 15 个批次（批次大小为 256）的特征，而对比方法通常需要存储最近 250 个批次 [24] 的 65K 个实例。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Linear classification on ImageNet. Top-1 accuracy for linear models trained on frozen features from different self-supervised methods. (left) Performance with a standard ResNet-50. (right) Performance as we multiply the width of a ResNet-50 by a factor ×2absent2\times 2, ×4absent4\times 4, and ×5absent5\times 5.
items.capZh: 图 2：ImageNet 上的线性分类。在不同自监督方法冻结特征上训练的线性模型的 Top-1 准确率。（左）标准 ResNet-50 的性能。（右）将 ResNet-50 宽度乘以 ×2、×4 和 ×5 时的性能。

full.sec: 3.2 Multi-crop: Augmenting views with smaller images
full.secZh: 3.2 多裁剪：用小图像增强视图

items.en: As noted in prior works [10, 44], comparing random crops of an image plays a central role by capturing information in terms of relations between parts of a scene or an object. Unfortunately, increasing the number of crops or “views” quadratically increases the memory and compute requirements. We propose a multi-crop strategy where we use two standard resolution crops and sample V𝑉V additional low resolution crops that cover only small parts of the image. Using low resolution images ensures only a small increase in the compute cost. Specifically, we generalize the loss of Eq (1):
items.zh: 如先前工作 [10, 44] 所述，比较图像的随机裁剪通过捕捉场景或对象部分之间的关系信息发挥核心作用。不幸的是，增加裁剪或“视角”的数量会二次增加内存和算力需求。我们提出一种多裁剪策略，使用两个标准分辨率裁剪并采样 V 个仅覆盖图像小部分的额外低分辨率裁剪。使用低分辨率图像确保算力成本仅小幅增加。具体地，我们推广公式 (1) 的损失：

items.en: Note that we compute codes using only the full resolution crops. Indeed, computing codes for all crops increases the computational time and we observe in practice that it also alters the transfer performance of the resulting network. An explanation is that using only partial information (small crops cover only small area of images) degrades the assignment quality. Figure 3 shows that multi-crop improves the performance of several self-supervised methods and is a promising augmentation strategy.
items.zh: 注意我们仅使用全分辨率裁剪计算编码。实际上，为所有裁剪计算编码会增加计算时间，并且我们在实践中观察到它还会损害所得网络的迁移性能。一个解释是，仅使用部分信息（小裁剪仅覆盖图像小区域）会降低分配质量。图 3 显示多裁剪提高了多种自监督方法的性能，是一种有前景的增强策略。

items.en: We analyze the features learned by SwAV by transfer learning on multiple datasets. We implement in SwAV the improvements used in SimCLR, i.e., LARS [64], cosine learning rate [40, 44] and the MLP projection head [10]. We provide the full details and hyperparameters for pretraining and transfer learning in the Appendix.
items.zh: 我们通过多个数据集上的迁移学习分析 SwAV 学习的特征。我们在 SwAV 中实现了 SimCLR 使用的改进，即 LARS [64]、余弦学习率 [40, 44] 和 MLP 投影头 [10]。我们在附录中提供了预训练和迁移学习的完整细节和超参数。

full.sec: 4.1 Evaluating the unsupervised features on ImageNet

items.en: We evaluate the features of a ResNet-50 [27] trained with SwAV on ImageNet by two experiments: linear classification on frozen features and semi-supervised learning by finetuning with few labels. When using frozen features (fig. 2 left), SwAV outperforms the state of the art by +4.2%percent4.2+4.2\% top-1 accuracy and is only 1.2%percent1.21.2\% below the performance of a fully supervised model. Note that we train SwAV during 800800800 epochs with large batches (409640964096). We refer to fig. 3 for results with shorter trainings and to table 3 for experiments with small batches. On semi-supervised learning (table 1), SwAV outperforms other self-supervised methods and is on par with state-of-the-art semi-supervised models [51], despite the fact that SwAV is not specifically designed for semi-supervised learning.
items.zh: 我们通过两个实验评估在 ImageNet 上使用 SwAV 训练的 ResNet-50 [27] 的特征：冻结特征上的线性分类和通过少量标签微调的半监督学习。使用冻结特征时（图 2 左），SwAV 以 +4.2% 的 top-1 准确率超越现有技术，仅比全监督模型性能低 1.2%。注意，我们使用大批量（4096）训练 SwAV 800 个 epoch。较短训练的结果见图 3，小批量实验见表 3。在半监督学习上（表 1），SwAV 优于其他自监督方法，并与最先进的半监督模型 [51] 持平，尽管 SwAV 并非专门为半监督学习设计。

items.en: Variants of ResNet-50. Figure 2 (right) shows the performance of multiple variants of ResNet-50 with different widths [35]. The performance of our model increases with the width of the model, and follows a similar trend to the one obtained with supervised learning. When compared with concurrent work like SimCLR, we see that SwAV reduces the difference with supervised models even further. Indeed, for large architectures, our method shrinks the gap with supervised training to 0.6%percent0.60.6\%.
items.zh: ResNet-50 变体。图 2（右）显示了不同宽度 [35] 的多个 ResNet-50 变体的性能。我们模型的性能随模型宽度增加而提高，并与监督学习获得的趋势相似。与 SimCLR 等同期工作相比，SwAV 进一步缩小了与监督模型的差距。实际上，对于大型架构，我们的方法将差距缩小到 0.6%。

full.sec: 4.2 Transferring unsupervised features to downstream tasks
full.secZh: 4.2 将无监督特征迁移到下游任务

items.en: We test the generalization of ResNet-50 features trained with SwAV on ImageNet (without labels) by transferring to several downstream vision tasks. In table 2, we compare the performance of SwAV features with ImageNet supervised pretraining. First, we report the linear classification performance on the Places205 [67], VOC07 [17], and iNaturalist2018 [54] datasets. Our method outperforms supervised features on all three datasets. Note that SwAV is the first self-supervised method to surpass ImageNet supervised features on these datasets. Second, we report network finetuning on object detection on VOC07+12 using Faster R-CNN [50] with a R50-C4 backbone and on COCO [38] using Mask R-CNN [26] with a R50-FPN backbone and finally using DETR detector [6]. DETR is a recent object detection framework that reaches competitive performance with Faster R-CNN while being conceptually simpler and trainable end-to-end. Interestingly, unlike Faster R-CNN [50], using a pretrained backbone for DETR is crucial to obtain good results compared to training from scratch [6]. In table 2, we show that SwAV outperforms the supervised pretrained model on both VOC07+12 and COCO datasets. Note that this is line with previous works that also show that self-supervision can outperform supervised pretraining on object detection [44, 24, 19]. We report more detection evaluation metrics and results from other self-supervised methods in the Appendix. Overall, our SwAV ResNet-50 model surpasses supervised ImageNet pretraining on all the considered transfer tasks and datasets. We have released this model so other researchers might also benefit by replacing the ImageNet supervised network with our model.
items.zh: 我们通过迁移到多个下游视觉任务，测试在 ImageNet 上使用 SwAV 训练的 ResNet-50 特征（无标签）的泛化能力。在表 2 中，我们将 SwAV 特征与 ImageNet 监督预训练的性能进行比较。首先，我们报告在 Places205 [67]、VOC07 [17] 和 iNaturalist2018 [54] 数据集上的线性分类性能。我们的方法在所有三个数据集上均优于监督特征。注意，SwAV 是第一个在这些数据集上超越 ImageNet 监督特征的自监督方法。其次，我们报告使用 Faster R-CNN [50]（R50-C4 骨干）在 VOC07+12 上的目标检测、使用 Mask R-CNN [26]（R50-FPN 骨干）在 COCO [38] 上的网络微调，以及最终使用 DETR 检测器 [6] 的结果。DETR 是一个最近的目标检测框架，在概念上更简单且可端到端训练，达到与 Faster R-CNN 竞争的性能。有趣的是，与 Faster R-CNN [50] 不同，使用预训练骨干对于 DETR 获得良好结果至关重要，相比从头训练 [6]。在表 2 中，我们显示 SwAV 在 VOC07+12 和 COCO 数据集上均优于监督预训练模型。注意，这与先前工作一致，表明自监督可以在目标检测上优于监督预训练 [44, 24, 19]。我们在附录中报告更多检测评估指标和其他自监督方法的结果。总体而言，我们的 SwAV ResNet-50 模型在所有考虑的迁移任务和数据集上均超越了监督的 ImageNet 预训练。我们已发布此模型，以便其他研究人员也能受益，用我们的模型替换 ImageNet 监督网络。

items.en: We train SwAV with small batches of 256256256 images on 444 GPUs and compare with MoCov2 and SimCLR trained in the same setup. In table 3, we see that SwAV maintains state-of-the-art performance even when trained in the small batch setting. Note that SwAV only stores a queue of 3,84038403,840 features. In comparison, to obtain good performance, MoCov2 needs to store 65,5366553665,536 features while keeping an additional momentum encoder network. When SwAV is trained using 2×160+4×9621604962\!\times\!160+4\!\times\!96 crops, SwAV has a running time 1.2×1.2\times higher than SimCLR with 2×22422242\!\times\!224 crops and is around 1.4×1.4\times slower than MoCov2 due to the additional back-propagation [11]. Hence, one epoch of MoCov2 or SimCLR is faster in wall clock time than one of SwAV, but these methods need more epochs for good downstream performance. Indeed, as shown in table 3, SwAV learns much faster and reaches higher performance in 4×4\times fewer epochs: 72%percent7272\% after 200200200 epochs (102102102 hours) while MoCov2 needs 800800800 epochs to achieve 71.1%percent71.171.1\%. Increasing the resolution and the number of epochs, SwAV reaches 74.3%percent74.374.3\% with a small batch size, a small number of stored features and no momentum encoder. Finally, note that SwAV could be combined with a momentum mechanism and a large queue [24]; we leave these explorations to future work.
items.zh: 我们在 4 个 GPU 上使用 256 张图像的小批次训练 SwAV，并与相同设置下训练的 MoCov2 和 SimCLR 进行比较。在表 3 中，我们看到即使在小批次设置下训练，SwAV 仍保持最先进性能。注意，SwAV 仅存储 3,840 个特征的队列。相比之下，为获得良好性能，MoCov2 需要存储 65,536 个特征，同时保留额外的动量编码器网络。当 SwAV 使用 2×160+4×96 裁剪训练时，运行时间比使用 2×224 裁剪的 SimCLR 高 1.2 倍，比 MoCov2 慢约 1.4 倍，这是由于额外的反向传播 [11]。因此，MoCov2 或 SimCLR 的一个 epoch 在挂钟时间上比 SwAV 快，但这些方法需要更多 epoch 才能获得良好的下游性能。实际上，如表 3 所示，SwAV 学习更快，在 4 倍更少的 epoch 中达到更高性能：200 个 epoch（102 小时）后达到 72%，而 MoCov2 需要 800 个 epoch 才能达到 71.1%。增加分辨率和 epoch 数，SwAV 在小批量、少量存储特征且无动量编码器的情况下达到 74.3%。最后，注意 SwAV 可以与动量机制和大队列 [24] 结合；我们将这些探索留给未来工作。

full.secZh: 5.1 基于聚类的自监督学习

items.en: In this section, we re-implement and improve previously published clustering-based models in order to assess if they can compete with recent contrastive methods such as SimCLR. In particular, we consider two clustering-based models: DeepCluster-v2 and SeLa-v2, which are obtained by applying various training improvements introduced in other self-supervised learning papers to DeepCluster [7] and SeLa [2]. Among these improvements are the use of stronger data augmentation [10], MLP projection head [10], cosine learning rate schedule [44], temperature parameter [58], memory bank [58], multi-clustering [2], etc. Full implementation details can be found in the Appendix. Besides, we also improve DeepCluster model by introducing explicit comparisons to k-means centroids, which increase stability and performance. Indeed, a main issue in DeepCluster is that there is no correspondance between two consecutive cluster assignments. Hence, the final classification layer learned for an assignment becomes irrelevant for the following one and thus needs to be re-initialized from scratch at each epoch. This considerably disrupts the convnet training. In DeepCluster-v2, instead of learning a classification layer predicting the cluster assignments, we perform explicit comparison between features and centroids.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们重新实现并改进先前发表的基于聚类的方法，以评估它们是否能与 SimCLR 等近期对比方法竞争。特别地，我们考虑两种基于聚类的方法：DeepCluster-v2 和 SeLa-v2，它们是通过将其他自监督学习论文中引入的各种训练改进应用于 DeepCluster [7] 和 SeLa [2] 获得的。这些改进包括使用更强的数据增强 [10]、MLP 投影头 [10]、余弦学习率调度 [44]、温度参数 [58]、记忆库 [58]、多聚类 [2] 等。完整实现细节见附录。此外，我们还通过引入与 k-means 质心的显式比较来改进 DeepCluster 模型，这增加了稳定性和性能。实际上，DeepCluster 的一个主要问题是连续两次聚类分配之间没有对应关系。因此，为一次分配学习的最终分类层对下一次分配变得无关，因此需要在每个 epoch 从头重新初始化。这严重干扰了卷积网络的训练。在 DeepCluster-v2 中，我们不再学习预测聚类分配的分类层，而是执行特征与质心之间的显式比较。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet with a linear classifier trained on top of frozen features from a ResNet-50. (left) Comparison between clustering-based and contrastive instance methods and impact of multi-crop. Self-supervised methods are trained for 400400400 epochs and supervised models for 200200200 epochs. (right) Performance as a function of epochs. We compare SwAV models trained with different number of epochs and report their running time based on our implementation.
items.capZh: 图 3：使用 ResNet-50 冻结特征上训练的线性分类器在 ImageNet 上的 Top-1 准确率。（左）基于聚类与对比实例方法的比较以及多裁剪的影响。自监督方法训练 400 个 epoch，监督模型训练 200 个 epoch。（右）性能随 epoch 的变化。我们比较了不同 epoch 数训练的 SwAV 模型，并报告基于我们实现的运行时间。

items.en: In fig. 3 (left), we make a best effort fair comparison between clustering-based and contrastive instance (SimCLR) methods by implementating these methods with the same data augmentation, number of epochs, batch-sizes, etc. In this setting, we observe that SwAV and DeepCluster-v2 outperform SimCLR by 2%percent22\% without multi-crop and by 3.5%percent3.53.5\% with multi-crop. This suggests the learning potential of clustering-based methods over instance classification.
items.zh: 在图 3（左）中，我们通过使用相同的数据增强、epoch 数、批量大小等实现这些方法，进行尽力公平的比较。在此设置下，我们观察到 SwAV 和 DeepCluster-v2 在无多裁剪时优于 SimCLR 2%，有多裁剪时优于 3.5%。这表明基于聚类的方法相对于实例分类的学习潜力。

items.en: In fig. 3 (left), we observe that SwAV performs on par with DeepCluster-v2. In addition, we train DeepCluster-v2 in SwAV best setting (800 epochs - 8 crops) and obtain 75.2%percent75.275.2\% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet (versus 75.3%percent75.375.3\% for SwAV). However, unlike SwAV, DeepCluster-v2 is not online which makes it impractical for extremely large datasets (§ 5.4). For billion scale trainings for example, a single pass on the dataset is usually performed [24]. DeepCluster-v2 cannot be trained for only one epoch since it works by performing several passes on the dataset to regularly update centroids and cluster assignments for each image.
items.zh: 在图 3（左）中，我们观察到 SwAV 与 DeepCluster-v2 性能相当。此外，我们在 SwAV 最佳设置（800 epoch - 8 裁剪）下训练 DeepCluster-v2，在 ImageNet 上获得 75.2% 的 top-1 准确率（SwAV 为 75.3%）。然而，与 SwAV 不同，DeepCluster-v2 不是在线方法，这使得它对于极大数据集不实用（§ 5.4）。例如，对于十亿规模训练，通常只对数据集进行一次遍历 [24]。DeepCluster-v2 不能仅训练一个 epoch，因为它需要多次遍历数据集以定期更新质心和每个图像的聚类分配。

items.en: As a matter of fact, DeepCluster-v2 can be interpreted as a special case of our proposed swapping mechanism: swapping is done across epochs rather than within a batch. Given a crop of an image DeepCluster-v2 predicts the assignment of another crop, which was obtained at the previous epoch. SwAV swaps assignments directly at the batch level and can thus work online.
items.zh: 实际上，DeepCluster-v2 可以解释为我们提出的交换机制的特例：交换跨 epoch 进行，而非在批次内。给定图像的一个裁剪，DeepCluster-v2 预测另一个裁剪（在前一个 epoch 获得）的分配。SwAV 直接在批次级别交换分配，因此可以在线工作。

full.sec: 5.2 Applying the multi-crop strategy to different methods
full.secZh: 5.2 将多裁剪策略应用于不同方法

items.en: In fig. 3 (left), we report the impact of applying our multi-crop strategy on the performance of a selection of other methods. Details of how we apply multi-crop to SimCLR loss can be found in the Appendix. We see that the multi-crop strategy consistently improves the performance for all the considered methods by a significant margin of 2−4%2percent42\!-\!4\% top-1 accuracy. Interestingly, multi-crop seems to benefit more clustering-based methods than contrastive methods. We note that multi-crop does not improve the supervised model.
items.zh: 在图 3（左）中，我们报告了将多裁剪策略应用于其他选定方法对性能的影响。如何将多裁剪应用于 SimCLR 损失的细节见附录。我们看到多裁剪策略对所有考虑的方法一致地提高了性能，top-1 准确率显著提升 2-4%。有趣的是，多裁剪似乎对基于聚类的方法比对对比方法更有利。我们注意到多裁剪并未改善监督模型。

items.en: In fig. 3 (right), we show the impact of the number of training epochs on performance for SwAV with multi-crop. We train separate models for 100100100, 200200200, 400400400 and 800800800 epochs and report the top-1 accuracy on ImageNet using the linear classification evaluation. We train each ResNet-50 on 646464 V100 16GB GPUs and a batch size of 409640964096. While SwAV benefits from longer training, it already achieves strong performance after 100100100 epochs, i.e., 72.1%percent72.172.1\% in 6h15.
items.zh: 在图 3（右）中，我们展示了训练 epoch 数对使用多裁剪的 SwAV 性能的影响。我们分别训练 100、200、400 和 800 个 epoch 的模型，并使用线性分类评估报告 ImageNet 上的 top-1 准确率。我们在 64 个 V100 16GB GPU 上训练每个 ResNet-50，批量大小为 4096。虽然 SwAV 受益于更长的训练，但它在 100 个 epoch 后（即 6 小时 15 分）已达到 72.1% 的强性能。

full.sec: 5.4 Unsupervised pretraining on a large uncurated dataset
full.secZh: 5.4 在大型未整理数据集上的无监督预训练

items.en: We evaluate SwAV on random, uncurated images that have different properties from ImageNet which allows us to test if our online clustering scheme and multi-crop augmentation work out of the box. In particular, we pretrain SwAV on an uncurated dataset of 1 billion random public non-EU images from Instagram. We test if SwAV can serve as a pretraining method for supervised learning. In fig. 4 (left), we measure the performance of ResNet-50 models when transferring to ImageNet with frozen or finetuned features. We report the results from He et al. [24] but note that their setting is different. They use a curated set of Instagram images, filtered by hashtags similar to ImageNet labels [41]. We compare SwAV with a randomly initialized network and with a network pretrained on the same data using SimCLR. We observe that SwAV maintains a similar gain of 6%percent66\% over SimCLR as when pretrained on ImageNet (fig. 2), showing that our improvements do not depend on the data distribution. We also see that pretraining with SwAV on random images significantly improves over training from scratch on ImageNet (+1.3%percent1.3+1.3\%) [8, 24]. This result is in line with Caron et al. [8] and He et al. [24]. In fig. 4 (right), we explore the limits of pretraining as we increase the model capacity. We consider the variants of the ResNeXt architecture [61] as in Mahajan et al. [41]. We compare SwAV with supervised models trained from scratch on ImageNet. For all models, SwAV outperforms training from scratch by a significant margin showing that it can take advantage of the increased model capacity. For reference, we also include the results from Mahajan et al. [41] obtained with a weakly-supervised model pretrained by predicting hashtags filtered to be similar to ImageNet classes. Interestingly, SwAV performance is strong when compared to this topline despite not using any form of supervision or filtering of the data.
items.zh: 我们在随机、未经整理的图像上评估 SwAV，这些图像具有与 ImageNet 不同的属性，这使我们能够测试我们的在线聚类方案和多裁剪增强是否开箱即用。特别是，我们在来自 Instagram 的 10 亿张随机公共非欧盟图像的非整理数据集上预训练 SwAV。我们测试 SwAV 是否可以作为监督学习的预训练方法。在图 4（左）中，我们测量了 ResNet-50 模型在冻结或微调特征下迁移到 ImageNet 时的性能。我们报告了 He 等人 [24] 的结果，但注意到他们的设置不同。他们使用经过整理的 Instagram 图像集，通过类似于 ImageNet 标签的 hashtag 进行过滤 [41]。我们将 SwAV 与随机初始化的网络以及使用 SimCLR 在同一数据上预训练的网络进行比较。我们观察到 SwAV 相对于 SimCLR 保持了 6% 的增益，与在 ImageNet 上预训练时相同（图 2），表明我们的改进不依赖于数据分布。我们还看到，在随机图像上使用 SwAV 进行预训练显著优于在 ImageNet 上从头训练（+1.3%）[8, 24]。这一结果与 Caron 等人 [8] 和 He 等人 [24] 一致。在图 4（右）中，我们随着模型容量的增加探索预训练的极限。我们考虑 ResNeXt 架构 [61] 的变体，如 Mahajan 等人 [41] 所述。我们将 SwAV 与在 ImageNet 上从头训练的监督模型进行比较。对于所有模型，SwAV 以显著优势优于从头训练，表明它可以利用增加的模型容量。作为参考，我们还包含了 Mahajan 等人 [41] 的结果，该结果使用弱监督模型预训练，通过预测过滤后类似于 ImageNet 类别的 hashtag 获得。有趣的是，尽管没有使用任何形式的监督或数据过滤，SwAV 的性能与这一顶级结果相比仍然强劲。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Pretraining on uncurated data. Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet for pretrained models on an uncurated set of 1B random Instagram images. (left) We compare ResNet-50 pretrained with either SimCLR or SwAV on two downstream tasks: linear classification on frozen features or finetuned features. (right) Performance of finetuned models as we increase the capacity of a ResNext following [41]. The capacity is provided in billions of Mult-Add operations. *: pretrained on a curated set of 111B Instagram images filtered with 1.51.51.5k hashtags similar to ImageNet classes.
items.capZh: 图 4：在非整理数据上的预训练。在 10 亿张随机 Instagram 图像的非整理集上预训练的模型在 ImageNet 上的 Top-1 准确率。（左）我们比较了使用 SimCLR 或 SwAV 预训练的 ResNet-50 在两个下游任务上的表现：冻结特征的线性分类或微调特征。（右）随着 ResNext 容量增加（遵循 [41]），微调模型的性能。容量以十亿次乘加操作数给出。*：在 11 亿张经过整理的 Instagram 图像集上预训练，该图像集使用 1.5k 个类似于 ImageNet 类别的 hashtag 进行过滤。

items.en: Self-supervised learning is rapidly progressing compared to supervised learning, even surpassing it on transfer learning, even though the current experimental settings are designed for supervised learning. In particular, architectures have been designed for supervised tasks, and it is not clear if the same models would emerge from exploring architectures with no supervision. Several recent works have shown that exploring architectures with search [39] or pruning [9] is possible without supervision, and we plan to evaluate the ability of our method to guide model explorations.
items.zh: 与监督学习相比，自监督学习正在快速进步，甚至在迁移学习上超越了监督学习，尽管当前的实验设置是为监督学习设计的。特别是，架构是为监督任务设计的，目前尚不清楚在没有监督的情况下探索架构是否会涌现出相同的模型。最近的几项工作表明，在没有监督的情况下，通过搜索 [39] 或剪枝 [9] 探索架构是可能的，我们计划评估我们的方法指导模型探索的能力。
